verses.latin_vulgate: Igitur Josue de nocte consurgens movit castra : egredientesque de Setim, venerunt ad Jordanem ipse et omnes filii Israël, et morati sunt ibi tres dies.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּשְׁכֵּם֩ יְהוֹשֻׁ֨עַ בַּבֹּ֜קֶר וַיִּסְע֣וּ מֵהַשִּׁטִּ֗ים וַיָּבֹ֙אוּ֙ עַד־הַיַּרְדֵּ֔ן ה֖וּא וְכׇל־בְּנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וַיָּלִ֥נוּ שָׁ֖ם טֶ֥רֶם יַעֲבֹֽרוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Joshua rose before daylight, and removed the camp: and they departed from Setim, and came to the Jordan: he, and all the children of Israel, and they abode there for three days.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Josua nousi aamulla varhain, ja he matkustivat Sittimistä ja tulivat Jordaniin asti, hän ja kaikki Israelin lapset ja he olivat siinä yötä ennenkuin he matkustivat ylitse.
verses.king_james: And Joshua rose early in the morning; and they removed from Shittim, and came to Jordan, he and all the children of Israel, and lodged there before they passed over.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quibus evolutis transierunt præcones per castrorum medium,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֕י מִקְצֵ֖ה שְׁלֹ֣שֶׁת יָמִ֑ים וַיַּעַבְר֥וּ הַשֹּׁטְרִ֖ים בְּקֶ֥רֶב הַֽמַּחֲנֶֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: After which, the heralds went through the midst of the camp,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja tapahtui kolmen päivän perästä, että päämiehet menivät leirin lävitse,
verses.king_james: And it came to pass after three days, that the officers went through the host;

verses.latin_vulgate: et clamare cœperunt : Quando videritis arcam fœderis Domini Dei vestri, et sacerdotes stirpis Leviticæ portantes eam, vos quoque consurgite, et sequimini præcedentes :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְצַוּוּ֮ אֶת־הָעָ֣ם לֵאמֹר֒ כִּרְאֹתְכֶ֗ם אֵ֣ת אֲר֤וֹן בְּרִית־יְהֹוָה֙ אֱלֹ֣הֵיכֶ֔ם וְהַכֹּֽהֲנִים֙ הַלְוִיִּ֔ם נֹשְׂאִ֖ים אֹת֑וֹ וְאַתֶּ֗ם תִּסְעוּ֙ מִמְּק֣וֹמְכֶ֔ם וַהֲלַכְתֶּ֖ם אַחֲרָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And began to proclaim: When you shall see the ark of the covenant of the Lord your God, and the priests of the race of Levi carrying it, rise you up also, and follow them as they go before:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja käskivät kansalle, sanoen: kuin te näette Herran teidän Jumalanne liitonarkin, ja papit Leviläiset kantavat sitä, niin matkustakaat te myös siastanne ja seuratkaat sitä,
verses.king_james: And they commanded the people, saying, When ye see the ark of the covenant of the Lord your God, and the priests the Levites bearing it, then ye shall remove from your place, and go after it.

verses.latin_vulgate: sitque inter vos et arcam spatium cubitorum duum millium : ut procul videre possitis, et nosse per quam viam ingrediamini : quia prius non ambulastis per eam : et cavete ne appropinquetis ad arcam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַ֣ךְ ׀ רָח֣וֹק יִֽהְיֶ֗ה בֵּֽינֵיכֶם֙ וּבֵנָ֔יו כְּאַלְפַּ֥יִם אַמָּ֖ה בַּמִּדָּ֑ה אַֽל־תִּקְרְב֣וּ אֵלָ֗יו לְמַ֤עַן אֲשֶׁר־תֵּֽדְעוּ֙ אֶת־הַדֶּ֙רֶךְ֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר תֵּֽלְכוּ־בָ֔הּ כִּ֣י לֹ֧א עֲבַרְתֶּ֛ם בַּדֶּ֖רֶךְ מִתְּמ֥וֹל שִׁלְשֽׁוֹם׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And let there be between you and the ark the space of two thousand cubits: that you may see it afar off, and know which way you must go: for you have not gone this way before: and take care you come not near the ark.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuitenkin niin että teidän välillänne ja hänen on liki kahdentuhannen kyynärän pituus siaa; eikä teidän pidä tuleman häntä juuri lähes, että te tietäisitte tien, jota teidän pitää matkustaman; sillä ette ennen ole sitä tietä vaeltaneet:
verses.king_james: Yet there shall be a space between you and it, about two thousand cubits by measure: come not near unto it, that ye may know the way by which ye must go: for ye have not passed this way heretofore.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixitque Josue ad populum : Sanctificamini : cras enim faciet Dominus inter vos mirabilia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֧אמֶר יְהוֹשֻׁ֛עַ אֶל־הָעָ֖ם הִתְקַדָּ֑שׁוּ כִּ֣י מָחָ֗ר יַעֲשֶׂ֧ה יְהֹוָ֛ה בְּקִרְבְּכֶ֖ם נִפְלָאֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Joshua said to the people: Be ye sanctified: for tomorrow the Lord will do wonders among you.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Josua sanoi kansalle: pyhittäkäät teitänne, sillä huomenna tekee Herra ihmeellisen työn teidän keskellänne.
verses.king_james: And Joshua said unto the people, Sanctify yourselves: for to morrow the Lord will do wonders among you.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ait ad sacerdotes : Tollite arcam fœderis, et præcedite populum. Qui jussa complentes, tulerunt, et ambulaverunt ante eos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֤אמֶר יְהוֹשֻׁ֙עַ֙ אֶל־הַכֹּהֲנִ֣ים לֵאמֹ֔ר שְׂאוּ֙ אֶת־אֲר֣וֹן הַבְּרִ֔ית וְעִבְר֖וּ לִפְנֵ֣י הָעָ֑ם וַיִּשְׂאוּ֙ אֶת־אֲר֣וֹן הַבְּרִ֔ית וַיֵּֽלְכ֖וּ לִפְנֵ֥י הָעָֽם׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And he said to the priests: Take up the ark of the covenant, and go before the people. And they obeyed his commands, and took it up, and walked before them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Josua puhui papeille, sanoen: ottakaat liitonarkki ja menkäät kansan edellä; niin he ottivat liitonarkin ja menivät kansan edellä.
verses.king_james: And Joshua spake unto the priests, saying, Take up the ark of the covenant, and pass over before the people. And they took up the ark of the covenant, and went before the people.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixitque Dominus ad Josue : Hodie incipiam exaltare te coram omni Israël : ut sciant quod sicut cum Moyse fui, ita et tecum sim.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֤אמֶר יְהֹוָה֙ אֶל־יְהוֹשֻׁ֔עַ הַיּ֣וֹם הַזֶּ֗ה אָחֵל֙ גַּדֶּלְךָ֔ בְּעֵינֵ֖י כׇּל־יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל אֲשֶׁר֙ יֵֽדְע֔וּן כִּ֗י כַּאֲשֶׁ֥ר הָיִ֛יתִי עִם־מֹשֶׁ֖ה אֶהְיֶ֥ה עִמָּֽךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord said to Joshua: This day will I begin to exalt thee before Israel: that they may know that as I was with Moses, so I am with thee also.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra sanoi Josualle: tänäpänä rupeen minä tekemään sinun suureksi koko Israelin edessä, että he tietäisivät, että niinkuin minä olin Moseksen kanssa, niin minä olen myös sinun kanssas.
verses.king_james: And the Lord said unto Joshua, This day will I begin to magnify thee in the sight of all Israel, that they may know that, as I was with Moses, so I will be with thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tu autem præcipe sacerdotibus, qui portant arcam fœderis, et dic eis : Cum ingressi fueritis partem aquæ Jordanis, state in ea.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַתָּ֗ה תְּצַוֶּה֙ אֶת־הַכֹּ֣הֲנִ֔ים נֹֽשְׂאֵ֥י אֲרֽוֹן־הַבְּרִ֖ית לֵאמֹ֑ר כְּבֹאֲכֶ֗ם עַד־קְצֵה֙ מֵ֣י הַיַּרְדֵּ֔ן בַּיַּרְדֵּ֖ן תַּעֲמֹֽדוּ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And do thou command the priests, that carry the ark of the covenant, and say to them: When you shall have entered into part of the water of the Jordan, stand in it.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja käske pappeja, jotka kantavat liitonarkkia, ja sano: kuin te tulette Jordanin vetten ääreen, niin seisahtukaat Jordanissa.
verses.king_james: And thou shalt command the priests that bear the ark of the covenant, saying, When ye are come to the brink of the water of Jordan, ye shall stand still in Jordan.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixitque Josue ad filios Israël : Accedite huc, et audite verbum Domini Dei vestri.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֥אמֶר יְהוֹשֻׁ֖עַ אֶל־בְּנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל גֹּ֣שׁוּ הֵ֔נָּה וְשִׁמְע֕וּ אֶת־דִּבְרֵ֖י יְהֹוָ֥ה אֱלֹהֵיכֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Joshua said to the children of Israel: Come hither, and hear the word of the Lord your God.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Josua sanoi Israelin lapsille: astukaat tänne ja kuulkaat Herran teidän Jumalanne sanaa.
verses.king_james: And Joshua said unto the children of Israel, Come hither, and hear the words of the Lord your God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et rursum : In hoc, inquit, scietis quod Dominus Deus vivens in medio vestri est, et disperdet in conspectu vestro Chananæum et Hethæum, Hevæum et Pherezæum, Gergesæum quoque et Jebusæum, et Amorrhæum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר יְהוֹשֻׁ֔עַ בְּזֹאת֙ תֵּֽדְע֔וּן כִּ֛י אֵ֥ל חַ֖י בְּקִרְבְּכֶ֑ם וְהוֹרֵ֣שׁ יוֹרִ֣ישׁ מִ֠פְּנֵיכֶ֠ם אֶת־הַכְּנַעֲנִ֨י וְאֶת־הַחִתִּ֜י וְאֶת־הַחִוִּ֗י וְאֶת־הַפְּרִזִּי֙ וְאֶת־הַגִּרְגָּשִׁ֔י וְהָאֱמֹרִ֖י וְהַיְבוּסִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And again he said: By this you shall know, that the Lord, the living God, is in the midst of you, and that he shall destroy, before your sight, the Chanaanite and the Hethite, the Hevite and the Pherezite, the Gergesite also, and the Jebusite, and the Amorrhite.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Josua sanoi: siitä tietäkäät elävän Jumalan olevan teidän seassanne, ja että hän kaiketi ajaa pois teidän edestänne Kanaanilaiset, Hetiläiset, Heviläiset, Pheresiläiset, Gergesiläiset, Amorilaiset ja Jebusilaiset:
verses.king_james: And Joshua said, Hereby ye shall know that the living God is among you, and that he will without fail drive out from before you the Canaanites, and the Hittites, and the Hivites, and the Perizzites, and the Girgashites, and the Amorites, and the Jebusites.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ecce arca fœderis Domini omnis terræ antecedet vos per Jordanem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִנֵּה֙ אֲר֣וֹן הַבְּרִ֔ית אֲד֖וֹן כׇּל־הָאָ֑רֶץ עֹבֵ֥ר לִפְנֵיכֶ֖ם בַּיַּרְדֵּֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: Behold, the ark of the covenant of the Lord of all the earth shall go before you into the Jordan.
verses.finnish_biblia: Katso, kaiken maailman hallitsian liitonarkki menee Jordanissa teidän edellänne.
verses.king_james: Behold, the ark of the covenant of the Lord of all the earth passeth over before you into Jordan.

verses.latin_vulgate: Parate duodecim viros de tribubus Israël, singulos per singulas tribus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַתָּ֗ה קְח֤וּ לָכֶם֙ שְׁנֵ֣י עָשָׂ֣ר אִ֔ישׁ מִשִּׁבְטֵ֖י יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל אִישׁ־אֶחָ֥ד אִישׁ־אֶחָ֖ד לַשָּֽׁבֶט׃
verses.douay_rheims: Prepare ye twelve men of the tribes of Israel, one of every tribe.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin ottakaat nyt teille kaksitoistakymmentä miestä Israelin sukukunnista, jokaisesta sukukunnasta yksi mies.
verses.king_james: Now therefore take you twelve men out of the tribes of Israel, out of every tribe a man.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et cum posuerint vestigia pedum suorum sacerdotes qui portant arcam Domini Dei universæ terræ in aquis Jordanis, aquæ quæ inferiores sunt, decurrent atque deficient : quæ autem desuper veniunt, in una mole consistent.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָ֡ה כְּנ֣וֹחַ כַּפּ֣וֹת רַגְלֵ֣י הַכֹּהֲנִ֡ים נֹשְׂאֵי֩ אֲר֨וֹן יְהֹוָ֜ה אֲד֤וֹן כׇּל־הָאָ֙רֶץ֙ בְּמֵ֣י הַיַּרְדֵּ֔ן מֵ֤י הַיַּרְדֵּן֙ יִכָּ֣רֵת֔וּן הַמַּ֥יִם הַיֹּרְדִ֖ים מִלְמָ֑עְלָה וְיַעַמְד֖וּ נֵ֥ד אֶחָֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when the priests, that carry the ark of the Lord the God of the whole earth, shall set the soles of their feet in the waters of the Jordan, the waters that are beneath shall run down and go off: and those that come from above, shall stand together upon a heap.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja pitää tapahtuman, että kuin papit, jotka kantavat Herran, kaiken maailman hallitsian arkkia, laskevat jalkansa Jordanin veteen, niin se vesi, joka Jordanissa ylimmäiseltä puolelta juoksee, eroittaa itsensä, niin että se seisoo yhdessä läjässä.
verses.king_james: And it shall come to pass, as soon as the soles of the feet of the priests that bear the ark of the Lord, the Lord of all the earth, shall rest in the waters of Jordan, that the waters of Jordan shall be cut off from the waters that come down from above; and they shall stand upon an heap.

verses.latin_vulgate: Igitur egressus est populus de tabernaculis suis, ut transiret Jordanem : et sacerdotes, qui portabant arcam fœderis, pergebant ante eum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֗י בִּנְסֹ֤עַ הָעָם֙ מֵאׇ֣הֳלֵיהֶ֔ם לַֽעֲבֹ֖ר אֶת־הַיַּרְדֵּ֑ן וְהַכֹּהֲנִ֗ים נֹ֥שְׂאֵ֛י הָאָר֥וֹן הַבְּרִ֖ית לִפְנֵ֥י הָעָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: So the people went out of their tents, to pass over the Jordan: and the priests that carried the ark of the covenant, went on before them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja koska kansa läksi majoistansa menemään Jordanin yli, ja papit kantoivat liitonarkkia kansan edellä,
verses.king_james: And it came to pass, when the people removed from their tents, to pass over Jordan, and the priests bearing the ark of the covenant before the people;

verses.latin_vulgate: Ingressisque eis Jordanem, et pedibus eorum in parte aquæ tinctis (Jordanis autem ripas alvei sui tempore messis impleverat),
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּכְב֞וֹא נֹשְׂאֵ֤י הָֽאָרוֹן֙ עַד־הַיַּרְדֵּ֔ן וְרַגְלֵ֤י הַכֹּֽהֲנִים֙ נֹשְׂאֵ֣י הָאָר֔וֹן נִטְבְּל֖וּ בִּקְצֵ֣ה הַמָּ֑יִם וְהַיַּרְדֵּ֗ן מָלֵא֙ עַל־כׇּל־גְּדוֹתָ֔יו כֹּ֖ל יְמֵ֥י קָצִֽיר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And as soon as they came into the Jordan, and their feet were dipped in part of the water, (now the Jordan, it being harvest time, had filled the banks of its channel,)
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuin arkin kantajat tulivat Jordaniin, ja pappein, arkin kantajain jalat kastuivat veden syrjään, (ja Jordan oli täynnä partaaseen saakka kaiken elonajan).
verses.king_james: And as they that bare the ark were come unto Jordan, and the feet of the priests that bare the ark were dipped in the brim of the water, (for Jordan overfloweth all his banks all the time of harvest,)

verses.latin_vulgate: steterunt aquæ descendentes in loco uno, et ad instar montis intumescentes apparebant procul, ab urbe quæ vocatur Adom usque ad locum Sarthan : quæ autem inferiores erant, in mare Solitudinis (quod nunc vocatur Mortuum) descenderunt, usquequo omnino deficerent.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּֽעַמְד֡וּ הַמַּ֩יִם֩ הַיֹּרְדִ֨ים מִלְמַ֜עְלָה קָ֣מוּ נֵד־אֶחָ֗ד הַרְחֵ֨ק מְאֹ֜ד (באדם) [מֵֽאָדָ֤ם] הָעִיר֙ אֲשֶׁר֙ מִצַּ֣ד צָֽרְתָ֔ן וְהַיֹּרְדִ֗ים עַ֣ל יָ֧ם הָעֲרָבָ֛ה יָם־הַמֶּ֖לַח תַּ֣מּוּ נִכְרָ֑תוּ וְהָעָ֥ם עָבְר֖וּ נֶ֥גֶד יְרִיחֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: The waters that came down from above stood in one place, and swelling up like a mountain, were seen afar off, from the city that is called Adom, to the place of Sarthan: but those that were beneath, ran down into the sea of the wilderness, (which now is called the Dead Sea) until they wholly failed.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin seisoi se vesi, joka ylimmäiseltä puolelta juoksee, koottuna yhdessä läjässä, sangen kaukana Adamin kaupungin puolessa, joka on Zartanin tykönä; mutta se vesi, joka juoksi alas korven mereen, nimittäin Suolaiseen mereen, väheni ja juoksi pois; niin meni kansa yli Jerihon kohdalla.
verses.king_james: That the waters which came down from above stood and rose up upon an heap very far from the city Adam, that is beside Zaretan: and those that came down toward the sea of the plain, even the salt sea, failed, and were cut off: and the people passed over right against Jericho.

verses.latin_vulgate: Populus autem incedebat contra Jericho : et sacerdotes qui portabant arcam fœderis Domini, stabant super siccam humum in medio Jordanis accincti, omnisque populus per arentem alveum transibat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּעַמְד֣וּ הַכֹּהֲנִ֡ים נֹ֠שְׂאֵ֠י הָאָר֨וֹן בְּרִית־יְהֹוָ֜ה בֶּחָרָבָ֛ה בְּת֥וֹךְ הַיַּרְדֵּ֖ן הָכֵ֑ן וְכׇל־יִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל עֹֽבְרִים֙ בֶּחָ֣רָבָ֔ה עַ֤ד אֲשֶׁר־תַּ֙מּוּ֙ כׇּל־הַגּ֔וֹי לַעֲבֹ֖ר אֶת־הַיַּרְדֵּֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the people marched over against Jericho: and the priests that carried the ark of the covenant of the Lord, stood girded upon the dry ground in the midst of the Jordan, and all the people passed over, through the channel that was dried up.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja papit, jotka kantoivat Herran liitonarkkia, seisoivat kuivan päällä, asetetut Jordanin keskellä ja koko Israel kävi kuivan päällä sen lävitse, siihenasti että kaikki kansa tuli Jordanin ylitse.
verses.king_james: And the priests that bare the ark of the covenant of the Lord stood firm on dry ground in the midst of Jordan, and all the Israelites passed over on dry ground, until all the people were passed clean over Jordan.
